title: MIDAS2 protocol example custom genome collection dataset v1
author: Zhao, Chunyu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Example input database of custom genome collection for MIDAS2 protocols. 

 Two genomes from two species ( Staphylococcus epidermidis  and  Streptococcus mutans  )
